text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Phew, what a fulfilling Bakushin day that was!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Mm... Seems like there's no one here.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Three Goddesses! Could you tell me who just
said my name?!
